classic.name: Classic
classic.description: The traditional Hexhaven look — no reskin, same names and art.

pirates.name: Pirate's Cove
pirates.description: A swashbuckling reskin: the robber becomes a buccaneer, settlements become outposts.

harvest.name: Harvest Festival
harvest.description: A warm harvest reskin: the robber becomes a wandering scarecrow.
